title: erycibe terminaliflora
intro: Erycibe terminaliflora, also known as the Bunga telang or Asian pigeonwings, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Erycibe terminaliflora include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for fever, headache, and skin conditions.
